outputs.description: The certificate object GUID. Venafi.Certificate.ParentDN The full path to the parent of the object in Trust Protection Platform.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.ID

outputs.description: date The exact date and time when the Certificate object was created. Venafi.Certificate.DN
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.CreatedOn

outputs.description: The DN of the certificate. Venafi.Certificate.Name The name of the certificate.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: The class name of the certificate object. Venafi.Certificate.Approver An array of one or more users or groups who are certificate approvers.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.SchemaClass

outputs.description: The CA template that is required for certificate renewal. Venafi.Certificate.Contact An array of one or more users or groups who receive event notifications. The events notify people about certificate expiration and validation failures.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.CertificateAuthorityDN

outputs.description: The level of management that the Trust Protection Platform applies to the certificate. Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.AIAKeyIdentifier Authority key identifier.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.ManagementType

outputs.description: The CN, O, L, S, and C values from the certificate request. Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.Serial The unique serial number that the CA assigned to the certificate.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.Issuer

outputs.description: The CN, O, L, S, and C values from the certificate request. Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.Thumbprint The SHA1 thumbprint hash of the certificate.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.Subject

outputs.description: Certificate validation start date. Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.ValidTo Certificate validation end time.
outputs.name: Venafi.Certificate.CertificateDetails.ValidFrom
